headline: Wabtec Declares Regular Quarterly Common Dividend
summary: PITTSBURGH, May 12, 2026--Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly common dividend of 31 cents per share, payable on June 3, 2026, to holders of record on May 22, 2026.

headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Find Risky
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
